zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane "Duchess of York" Declay於1470年出生時，她的父親Sir Matthew de Dublin22歲，母親Lady Ann de Lacy22歲。她和Sir William Wilkinson至少有1個兒子。她去世於1555年享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane "Duchess of York" Declay于1470年出生时，她的父亲Sir Matthew de Dublin22岁，母亲Lady Ann de Lacy22岁。她和Sir William Wilkinson至少有1个儿子。她去世于1555年享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Declay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe ‘descendant of Donn Sleibhe’ (see Dunleavy ).
English: variant of Delea, a name of uncertain meaning, possibly a variant of Duley .
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from Lay (Loire).

variants.name: Dunleavy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Connor, John Patrick, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duinnshléibhe or Ó Duinnshléibhe ‘son of Donn Sléibhe’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + sléibhe ‘of the mountain’, meaning ‘chieftain (literally, brown one) of the mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: York"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a local name from the city in north-eastern England. The place name was originally Eburacon, a derivative of a Welsh word meaning ‘yew’. The Anglo-Saxon settlers changed this to Old English Eoforwīc ‘boar farm’, which in Old Norse became Iorvík or Iork.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane "Duchess of York" Declay was born in 1470, her father, Sir Matthew de Dublin, was 22 and her mother, Lady Ann de Lacy, was 22. She had at least 1 son with Sir William Wilkinson. She died in 1555, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane "Duchess of York" Declay est née en 1470, son père, Sir Matthew de Dublin, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Ann de Lacy, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir William Wilkinson. Elle est décédée en 1555, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane "Duchess of York" Declay 1470 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Matthew de Dublin 22 und ihre Mutter Lady Ann de Lacy 22. Sie hatte mit Sir William Wilkinson mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1555 im Alter von 85 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane "Duchess of York" Declay è nata il nel 1470, sua padre, Sir Matthew de Dublin, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Lady Ann de Lacy, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir William Wilkinson. Morì nel 1555, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane "Duchess of York" Declayが1470年に生まれた時，父Sir Matthew de Dublinは22歳，母Lady Ann de Lacyは22歳であった。彼女はSir William Wilkinsonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1555年に85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane "Duchess of York" Declay(이)가 1470년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Matthew de Dublin(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Ann de Lacy(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Wilkinson(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1555년 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane "Duchess of York" Declay nasceu em 1470, seu pai, Sir Matthew de Dublin, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ann de Lacy, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sir William Wilkinson. Ela faleceu em 1555, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane "Duchess of York" Declay родилась в 1470 г., её отцу по имени Sir Matthew de Dublin было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Ann de Lacy, 22. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir William Wilkinson. Она умерла в 1555 г. в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane "Duchess of York" Declay nació en 1470, su papá, Sir Matthew de Dublin, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Ann de Lacy, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sir William Wilkinson. Murió en 1555, a la edad de 85 años.
